highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 updates to Skia milestone m151 with allocation-free rendering paths and WASM/.NET 11 support.
highlights_body: This preview brings the full m151 engine upgrade, multiple upstream bug-fix merges, and a sweep of zero-allocation improvements across the HarfBuzz and text pipelines. It also adds Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for WASM on .NET 11.

bullets.detail: The bundled Skia engine advances to m151, including multiple upstream Chrome/m151 bug-fix merge rounds that improve stability and correctness across rendering backends.
A stale SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition in the Skia submodule that caused WASM build warnings has been removed.

bullets.lead: SKColor hex parsing gains ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads
bullets.detail: SKColor parsing is optimized and new ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads are added, reducing allocations for hot string-to-color conversion paths.

HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8 now uses pooled UTF-8 encoding, and per-call char[4] allocations in HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse are eliminated — reducing GC pressure in high-frequency shaping loops.
SKShaper now reads glyph results via zero-copy spans, avoiding intermediate buffer copies on the hot shaping path.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed
bullets.detail: A native resource was leaked when calling SKImage.FromEncodedData with a region rectangle. The handle is now released correctly.

bullets.lead: GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context
bullets.detail: An unnecessary unsafe modifier on GRContextOptions has been removed; the type is now fully safe.
Prebuilt Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries are now included for WASM targets targeting .NET 11.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Fixed the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition in the Skia submodule, added Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for WASM on .NET 11, and contributed a visual regression test harness.

preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.2.1: Preview 2 delivered a performance sweep — allocation-free HarfBuzz text encoding, zero-copy SKShaper spans, ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads for SKColor — plus upstream m151 bug fixes and the GRContextOptions unsafe removal.
preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.1.1: Preview 1 opened the 4.151.0 line with the Skia m151 engine upgrade and a WASM submodule fix that dropped a stale SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition.

harfbuzz_summary: Adds allocation-free UTF-8 encoding in Buffer.AddUtf8 via pooled encoding, and eliminates per-call char[4] allocations in Tag.Parse — measurably reducing GC pressure in high-frequency text-shaping workloads. Also includes the Emscripten 5.0.6 WASM static libraries.
